name: horizontal-scroller
title: Horizontal Scroller
description: A generic horizontal list — pass items and a cell builder. Paging, snapping, peek (a sliver of the next item), and optional scale/alpha falloff for off-center items.

variants.title: Paged
variants.description: Snaps one full page at a time.

variants.title: Peek
variants.description: Shows a sliver of the next item.
